title: pedicularis bracteosa var. paysoniana
intro: Pedicularis bracteosa var. paysoniana, also known as Payson Lop Host, is a plant species in the bumblebee balm family, Pedicularis, which is a type of flowering plant. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, as it has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pedicularis bracteosa var. paysoniana include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
